PAGE_TITLE: Commenting System for Canvas LMS | FastComments
META_DESCRIPTION: Add live threaded comments and collaborative chat to your Canvas LMS with FastComments LTI integration. Automatic SSO, GDPR compliant. Free trial.
HEAD_KEYWORDS: canvas lms comments, canvas commenting plugin, canvas lti tool, fastcomments canvas, canvas discussion tool, canvas course comments, canvas lms sso comments
HERO_DESCRIPTION: Add threaded discussions, real-time collaborative chat, and automatic SSO to every Canvas course. No server to host - just configure and go.
STYLES_TITLE: Three Ways to Engage Your Learners
STYLES_SUBTITLE: FastComments brings flexible commenting styles to Canvas - choose what fits each course.
STYLE_1_DESCRIPTION: Add nested, threaded discussions to any Canvas course. Students reply in context, instructors moderate with ease, and conversations stay organized even in large classes.
STYLE_1_IMAGE_ALT: Threaded comments on a Canvas course page
STYLE_2_DESCRIPTION: Enable live chat alongside course content for study groups, office hours, or peer collaboration. Messages appear instantly with online presence indicators.
STYLE_2_IMAGE_ALT: Collaborative chat in a Canvas course
STYLE_3_DESCRIPTION: Attach comment threads to individual Canvas pages, assignments, or modules. Students discuss specific content right where it lives.
FEATURES_SUBTITLE: Everything instructors and administrators need to run engaging, safe discussions.
FEATURE_SSO_DESCRIPTION: Students are automatically signed in using their Canvas account via LTI 1.3. No separate registration, no password friction.
FEATURE_MENTIONS_DESCRIPTION: Tag classmates with @mentions and let students upvote the most helpful answers to surface quality content.
FEATURE_EDITOR_DESCRIPTION: Full rich text with images, code blocks, links, and formatting. Markdown support for technically inclined users.
FEATURE_NOTIFICATIONS_DESCRIPTION: Email and in-app notifications keep students engaged. Configurable per-user so nobody gets overwhelmed.
FEATURE_PRESENCE_DESCRIPTION: See who is currently viewing and participating in a discussion in real time. Encourages active engagement.
FEATURE_GDPR_DESCRIPTION: EU-based CDN option ensures data stays in Europe. Full GDPR compliance with data export and deletion support.
HOW_IT_WORKS_SUBTITLE: Three steps to better Canvas discussions.
HOW_IT_WORKS_STEP_1_DESCRIPTION: Enable Canvas LTI in your FastComments dashboard and copy the configuration URL.
HOW_IT_WORKS_STEP_2_DESCRIPTION: Create a Developer Key in Canvas using the configuration URL. Enable it and paste the Client ID back.
HOW_IT_WORKS_STEP_3_DESCRIPTION: Comments and chat appear in Canvas courses. Students are automatically signed in via LTI SSO.
FAQ_CANVAS_LMS_FREE_TRIAL_ANSWER: Yes. FastComments offers a 30-day free trial with full access to all features, including LTI SSO, collaborative chat, and the rich text editor. No credit card required to start.
FAQ_CANVAS_LMS_SSO: How does SSO work with Canvas?
FAQ_CANVAS_LMS_SSO_ANSWER: When a student opens FastComments from Canvas, the LTI 1.3 protocol securely passes their identity (name, email, avatar, and role) to FastComments. A corresponding FastComments account is created automatically. Students never need to register separately.
FAQ_CANVAS_LMS_HOSTING: Do I need to host a server?
FAQ_CANVAS_LMS_HOSTING_ANSWER: No. FastComments hosts all the LTI endpoints. You just configure Canvas to point to FastComments using the provided configuration URL. There is nothing to install or maintain on your servers.
FAQ_CANVAS_LMS_GDPR_ANSWER: Yes. FastComments is fully GDPR compliant with an optional EU-based CDN that keeps all data within Europe. We support data export requests, right-to-deletion, and provide a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) on request.
FAQ_CANVAS_LMS_COLLAB_CHAT_ANSWER: Collaborative chat is a real-time messaging mode that can be enabled alongside or instead of threaded comments. It is ideal for live study sessions, office hours, or group activities where students need instant back-and-forth communication.
FAQ_CANVAS_LMS_ROLES_ANSWER: Canvas roles are automatically mapped: Canvas Administrators become FastComments Admins, Instructors become Moderators (who can manage comments), and Learners are regular commenters. This happens automatically through the LTI launch.
FINAL_CTA_DESCRIPTION: Add threaded comments, collaborative chat, and automatic SSO to your Canvas LMS in minutes.
